title: Curated Hinglish Dataset for Deep Learning-Based Misogyny Detection
affiliation: School of Computing, Graphic Era Hill University (GEHU), Dehradun
key_findings: Fine-tuned BERT outperformed BiLSTM, CNN, and traditional ML models (Logistic Regression, SVM, Random Forest).
Hinglish code-mixed text presents challenges like inconsistent spellings, sarcasm, and cultural expressions.
Misogyny detection in code-mixed languages is crucial for online safety in multilingual societies like India.
abstract_snippet: This study focuses on developing a dataset containing 17,234 Hindi-English code-mixed comments from multiple social media platforms, annotated manually. Fine-tuned BERT achieved the highest 0.92 accuracy.
